name: Washington Apple Cake
recipeIngredient: 4 cups Tart apples (5 medium, pared and thinly sliced)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat eggs with a mixer until thick and light.
2. Combine sugar and oil; pour into eggs with mixer on medium speed.
3. Stir together flour, cinnamon, soda, and salt; add to egg mixture with vanilla; beat to mix. Stir in walnuts.
4. Spread apples in a buttered 13x9x2 inch pan. Pour batter over apples, spreading to cover.
5. Bake in a 350 degree oven for 1 hour. Remove from oven and cool.
6. Spread with Cream Cheese Icing.
Cream Cheese Icing:
1. Soften 2-3 oz packages cream cheese until fluffy.
2. Beat in 1/4 cup melted butter.
3. Beat in 2 cups powdered sugar and 1 teaspoon lemon juice.
4. Spread over cooled cake.
5. Refrigerate.
